checks.description: Outputs must be mutually exclusive: at most one of A_greater, A_equal, A_less is high for any stable input combination.
checks.pass_condition: For each observation after inputs stabilize, the sum of the three output bits is exactly 1.
checks.trigger_condition: When any stimulus from the linked edge case is applied.

checks.description: Verify that the comparator outputs correctly reflect the relational result for a representative set of legal inputs.
checks.pass_condition: For each driven pair (A,B), exactly one output is high and it matches the mathematical comparison (A>B => A_greater, A==B => A_equal, A<B => A_less).
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 stimulus applies a legal input pattern.
